description: Composition Khaki corduroy trouser made of 100% cotton, has a flat front, pockets on the front with a patch pocket above the right one, two pockets at the back, looped waist, and a zipper and button closure on the front Fitting Smart Wash care Machine wash warm in a gentle cycle, using a mild detergent Use only non-chlorine bleach if needed Tumble dry low Warm iron Designed for the man of refined taste, this corduroy trouser from the Core Gravity collection of peter england is crafted from cotton fabric to offer exemplary all-day comfort. Team it with polo neck t-shirts or semi-formals and suede boots. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
